subtitle: Four Engines. Percussion and Predators.
license: Free for personal and commercial use
design_philosophy: TIDE TABLES showed the gentle side of XO_OX — arrival at shore, open water, surface shimmer. MACHINE GUN REEF goes deeper and more aggressive. This is the reef at night, in current, alive with violence and beauty. Percussion-forward with massive low-end architecture and swarm chaos.

programs.description: ONSET's full synthesis drum kit — 8 voices: kick, snare, closed hat, open hat, clap, tom, perc, FX. Heavy, punchy, and fast. The Machine Gun.
programs.notes: Pads 1-8: primary kit voices. Pads 9-16: velocity variations and FX variants. XVC cross-voice coupling active.

programs.description: OCEANIC's bioluminescent swarm — bass pads, atmospheric motion, and chromatophore modulation. 16 zones across 4 octaves of reef sounds.
programs.notes: Low octave: sub and bass swarm tones. Mid: harmonic swarm clusters. High: shimmer and scatter. COUPLING macro routes to ONSET for cross-engine rhythm.

programs.description: ORCA's predator engine — wavetable bass and leads with breach dynamics, echolocation echo, and deep ocean filtering. The hunter.
programs.notes: Velocity-sensitive filter sweep (D001 active). Breach threshold creates dynamic transient bursts. Echo routes to reverb tail.

programs.description: OBESE's fat bass architecture — sub-heavy, saturated, with Mojo axis from warm analog to digital precision. The weight.
programs.notes: Pads 1-8: foundation bass voices. Pads 9-12: arpeggiator patterns. Pads 13-16: character extremes (full analog to digital crush).

programs.description: 16 curated pads drawing the best from all 4 engines — a complete production toolkit in one program.
programs.notes: Designed for immediate use in a session. Kick, bass, reef texture, swarm, orca lead, pressure pad — 16 pads = full palette.

qa_requirements.notes: Paid product — higher bar than TIDE TABLES

differentiation_from_tide_tables.tide_tables: Gentle, accessible. ONSET + ODYSSEY + OPAL. Drums + leads + granular. Gateway pack.
differentiation_from_tide_tables.machine_gun_reef: Aggressive, deep. ONSET + OCEANIC + ORCA + OBESE. Percussion + swarm + predator + fat bass. Premium experience.

marketing_hooks: ONSET at its most aggressive — the Machine Gun mode
OCEANIC's chromatophore modulation explored for bass players
ORCA breach dynamics: velocity-triggered transient attacks
OBESE's Mojo axis: analog warmth to digital edge in one knob
80 pads across 5 programs — full production toolkit
$15 shows the depth of XOmnibus beyond the free pack

naming_origin.machine_gun: Anti-machine-gun effect in XPN format — round-robin velocity layers preventing identical sample triggering. Also: the relentless, rapid percussion energy.
naming_origin.reef: Coral reef ecosystem — alive, complex, interdependent. The four engines function like reef organisms: ONSET (the rhythmic heartbeat), OCEANIC (the swarm), ORCA (the apex predator), OBESE (the weight that holds everything down).

release_checklist: All 5 programs designed and fully specified
XPM files generated via xpn_drum_export.py and xpn_keygroup_export.py
Cover art created (4 engine colors + reef visual)
Hardware test on MPC Live II — full load test
Gumroad listing created with correct price and assets
Signal post written announcing paid pack
next_step: Use xpn_drum_export.py (ONSET program) + xpn_keygroup_export.py (OCEANIC/ORCA/OBESE programs) to generate XPM files. Then assemble with xpn_bundle_builder.py.
